world.title: Hundreds missing after Rohingya boat capsizes in Andaman Sea: UN
world.summary: About 250 Rohingya refugees and Bangladeshi nationals are feared missing after a boat capsized in the Andaman Sea, according to the United Nations. The vessel, carrying men, women, and children, reportedly sank due to heavy winds, rough seas, and overcrowding. The incident highlights ongoing dangers faced by migrants in the region as they attempt perilous sea journeys.

world.title: Jaishankar discusses Iran, Hormuz and Lebanon with Israel's Sa'ar
world.summary: Indian External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar discussed regional issues, including Iran's actions affecting navigation in the Strait of Hormuz, during a phone call with Israeli Minister Eli Sa'ar. Sa'ar emphasized the need for action regarding Iran's influence. Jaishankar also spoke with Australian Foreign Minister Penny Wong, addressing the ongoing conflict involving Iran and the US-Israel alliance.

world.title: Iran talks 2.0 may happen in next two days in Pak, says Trump. Then praises Munir
world.summary: US President Donald Trump indicated that a second round of talks with Iran may occur within the next two days in Pakistan. His comments come amid rising tensions following the US blockade of Iranian ports, with Tehran threatening regional strikes. The situation in the Strait of Hormuz could escalate hostilities and worsen the economic impact of the ongoing regional conflict.

business.title: Gold surges as Iran talks hopes dent US Dollar again
business.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) prices increased nearly 2% on Tuesday, reaching $4,835 after recovering from daily lows of $4,742. This surge is attributed to rising optimism regarding the resumption of US-Iran talks, despite ongoing tensions, including the US military's seizure of Iran-linked ships and the continued blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

business.title: Trade Spotlight: How should you trade Engineers India, Sona Comstar, Lenskart, KRN Heat Exchanger, TD Power Systems, Bharti Airtel, and others on April 15?
business.summary: The market is anticipated to recover, fueled by optimism regarding potential US-Iran peace talks. On April 15, experts recommend 13 trading ideas, including Engineers India, Sona Comstar, Lenskart, KRN Heat Exchanger, TD Power Systems, and Bharti Airtel. Investors are advised to consider these short-term opportunities as market conditions evolve in response to geopolitical developments.

business.title: Tata invests ₹1,500 crore more to charge up iPhone biz
business.summary: Tata Group has invested ₹1,500 crore in Tata Electronics to enhance its iPhone manufacturing capabilities and plans additional investments. The group has also boosted capital in its Pegatron India unit. Analysts suggest this move indicates a focus on long-term capacity expansion, as Tata aims to strengthen its position within Apple’s supply chains and expand into the semiconductor sector.

technology.title: New material may help aluminium batteries last longer, cost less
technology.summary: Scientists in Bengaluru have made progress in developing aluminium batteries as a safer and cheaper alternative to lithium-ion batteries. A research team, led by Kavita Patil, has addressed a longstanding issue that has hindered the performance of aluminium batteries. This advancement could potentially enhance battery longevity and reduce costs, contributing to the future of energy storage solutions.

technology.title: GoPro Launches Mission 1 Pro with 8K Video and Advanced Features
technology.summary: GoPro has launched the Mission 1 Pro, part of its new Mission 1 series, which features 8K video and 50MP photos. This camera is designed to enhance the action camera market by incorporating advanced capabilities typically found in professional filming equipment. The Mission 1 Pro aims to redefine how users capture high-quality action footage.

technology.title: GoPro Unveils Mission 1 Lineup with 8K Video and Pro-Grade Interchangeable Lenses
technology.summary: GoPro has launched its Mission 1 lineup of action cameras, which includes the Mission 1, Mission 1 Pro, and Mission 1 Pro ILS. Each model features a large 1-inch sensor capable of recording 8K video and offers enhanced low-light performance. The cameras are designed for professional use, incorporating interchangeable lenses for versatile shooting options.

sports.title: ”We’ll have to put four or six on him’ - Diego Simeone responds to Lamine Yamal’s challenge ahead of Barcelona’s clash with Atletico
sports.summary: Diego Simeone, the Atletico Madrid manager, humorously suggested he might assign “four or six men” to mark Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal ahead of their Champions League quarter-final second leg. This comment follows Yamal's pre-match remarks, where he expressed curiosity about whether Simeone would include him in the game plan. The match is set to take place tonight.

sports.title: IPL 2026: Noor Ahmad's trickery stands out as CSK hand KKR fourth defeat in 5 games
sports.summary: Chennai Super Kings defeated Kolkata Knight Riders by 32 runs in the IPL, marking KKR's fourth loss in five matches. Playing on a challenging, two-paced pitch, KKR struggled in their chase of 193 runs, finishing at 160/7. CSK's performance highlighted the difficulties faced by KKR, further impacting their campaign in the tournament.

sports.title: Rohit skips MI nets but no information on tear in hamstring
sports.summary: Rohit Sharma did not attend the Mumbai Indians' practice session on April 14, raising concerns about his fitness ahead of the upcoming match against Punjab Kings. The team management has not confirmed the status of his hamstring injury, leaving his availability uncertain. They may choose to prioritize caution or allow Rohit to make the final decision regarding his participation.

health.title: When antibiotics fail: The hidden cost of self-medication
health.summary: Misuse of antibiotics during self-medication can lead to stronger infections, as improper use trains bacteria to resist treatment. A recent clinic visit highlighted this issue when a patient reported taking antibiotics for flu-like symptoms without medical guidance. Such practices contribute to the growing problem of antibiotic resistance, posing significant public health risks and complicating future treatment options.

health.title: Childhood cancer in India on the rise: Expert warns late diagnosis is reducing survival rates among children
health.summary: Childhood cancer cases in India are increasing, with experts highlighting that late diagnosis is significantly reducing survival rates among affected children. The importance of early detection and increased awareness is emphasized as crucial for improving outcomes. Efforts to enhance public understanding and access to medical resources are necessary to save more young lives from this rising health concern.

health.title: The gut microbiome as a fingerprint of antibiotic use history
health.summary: A study involving 14,979 individuals revealed that antibiotic use over eight years significantly altered gut microbiome composition. Data from the Swedish National Prescribed Drug Register and stool metagenomic profiles were analyzed. Changes occurred even after a single antibiotic course and varied across different antibiotic classes, highlighting the long-term impact of antibiotics on gut health.

science.title: Is Yellowstone volcano near eruption? New study sparks buzz, scientists urge caution
science.summary: A recent study indicates that magma could be closer to the surface beneath Yellowstone, raising concerns about a potential eruption. However, scientists caution that fears of an imminent eruption are likely overstated. They emphasize the need for careful interpretation of the findings and remind the public that the volcano's behavior is complex and not necessarily indicative of an eruption.

science.title: Study Links Excessive Screentime To Eating Disorders
science.summary: A recent study published in the Journal of Medical Internet Research indicates that excessive smartphone use is a significant risk factor for developing eating disorders. While health experts assert that smartphones are not the direct cause of these disorders, they can negatively impact eating habits. This finding highlights the broader implications of excessive screentime beyond eye strain and sleep disruption.

science.title: This supermassive black hole is located in an unusual part of its galaxy
science.summary: Astronomers using the James Webb Space Telescope have identified a supermassive black hole in an unusual location within the elliptical galaxy NGC 4486B. This black hole has a mass approximately 360 million times that of the Sun. The discovery, stemming from over 30 years of observation, has led to the proposal of a new hypothesis to explain its positioning.

entertainment.title: Sir one more chance please: Buchi Babu’s comment on Ram Charan’s Insta post goes viral
entertainment.summary: Ram Charan is currently filming the sports action drama "Peddi," directed by Buchi Babu Sana. The film's release, originally set for April 30, has been postponed with no new date announced. Recently, Buchi Babu's comment on Ram Charan's Instagram post gained attention, contributing to discussions around the film and its production status in the Telugu cinema industry.

entertainment.title: Here Are All The K-Pop Artists Nominated For The 2026 American Music Awards
entertainment.summary: The 2026 American Music Awards (AMAs) announced its nominees on April 14. K-Pop artists are included among the nominees, selected based on fan interactions such as streaming and album sales. The AMAs aim to recognize popular music and its impact on fans. The full list of nominees highlights the growing influence of K-Pop in the global music scene.

entertainment.title: Bobby Deol recalls Dharmendra’s struggle with alcohol; says his loss brought him closer to Esha Deol and Ahana Deol
entertainment.summary: Bobby Deol has shared his personal journey of quitting alcohol, which he accomplished a year and a half ago. He noted that the transition was easier than anticipated. Deol also reflected on his father, Dharmendra’s struggles with alcohol, stating that the loss brought him closer to his sisters, Esha Deol and Ahana Deol, strengthening their family bond.
